creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
The POLA violation is not working with tty devices. The change was the simplest one that fixes that, which meant it quit working with cua devices, which doesn't astonish me in the slightest.

I'm sorry your having problems understanding me, but I'm also tired of dealing with this issue. Either use the patch as is, use it without the libserial changes and change of maintainer, or reject it.
